ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wine_quality" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wine sample */,
  "fixed_acidity" REAL /* Concentration of fixed acidity in the wine */,
  "volatile_acidity" REAL /* Concentration of volatile acidity in the wine */,
  "citric_acid" REAL /* Concentration of citric acid in the wine */,
  "residual_sugar" REAL /* Amount of residual sugar in the wine */,
  "chlorides" REAL /* Concentration of chlorides in the wine */,
  "free_sulfur_dioxide" REAL /* Amount of free sulfur dioxide in the wine */,
  "total_sulfur_dioxide" REAL /* Total amount of sulfur dioxide in the wine */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the wine */,
  "ph" REAL /* pH value of the wine */,
  "sulphates" REAL /* Concentration of sulphates in the wine */,
  "alcohol" REAL /* Alcohol percentage by volume in the wine */,
  "quality" INTEGER /* Quality rating of the wine on a scale (e.g., 1-10) */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the batch table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batch" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch */,
  "batch_name" TEXT /* Name of the batch */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the batch was produced */,
  "grape_variety" TEXT /* Type of grape variety used in the batch */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the grapes were grown */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, quality_control) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_batch_access" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user table */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the batch table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Report data in JSON format */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the batch table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_version" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version entry */,
  "wine_quality_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the wine quality table */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
